hero.title: Standalone Mind Map Workspace
hero.description: Extract structure from papers, PDFs, PPTs, documents, or raw notes, generate a dedicated tree-shaped mind map, then keep editing, rebalancing, and saving inside one page.

pricing.title: Billing
pricing.description: Mind maps are charged by the size of the final tree: node count plus a small depth bonus for deeper structures.
pricing.depthSummary: Depth bonus: after depth 4, each extra level adds 1 point, capped at +2.
pricing.preview: Current input estimates about {{points}} points; the final charge is based on the actual tree.
pricing.previewNote: The estimate is only a preview. Final billing follows the generated tree.
pricing.actual: This run produced {{nodes}} nodes at depth {{depth}}, charged {{points}} points.
pricing.ruleSummary: Rule: node-count tiers plus a small depth bonus.

input.title: Input Sources
input.subtitle: Upload multiple documents or paste raw text directly.
input.dropzone: Click to choose files, or drop PDF / DOCX / PPTX / TXT files here
input.textPlaceholder: Paste an abstract, outline, meeting notes, or any raw text you want transformed into a mind map...

editor.title: Mind Map Workbench
editor.subtitle: The center canvas uses a dedicated tree layout. The right panel edits node content and branch structure.
editor.emptyDesc: Upload documents or paste text, then generate a mind map. After generation, keep editing nodes, add branches, and save the structured tree here.

details.title: Node Details
details.subtitle: Click a node in the canvas, then edit its label, summary, and branch structure here.
details.label: Node Label
details.empty: Select a node from the canvas to edit it.
details.highlightsEmpty: No extra highlights were returned for this run.
details.sourceEmpty: The saved file path will appear here after generation.

status.generated: Mind map generated. You can keep editing and save the tree.

errors.missingInput: Please upload files or enter some text first.
errors.missingApi: This deployment requires an API URL and API Key.
errors.quota: Not enough points to generate a mind map (estimated {{points}} points).
errors.exportFailed: Mind map export failed. Please try again later.
errors.server: Mind map generation failed. Please try again later.
